axis: adversarial: a must-have excluded by a non-goal

mustHaves.summary: Sign in + save a web clipping (URL, title, text, tags)
Search/filter clippings by tag and text
Export selected clippings as a formatted PDF dossier

blocking.detail: M3 (export a PDF dossier) is directly forbidden by §5 ('NOT generate, render, or export any files — no PDF, no downloads, no document generation of any kind'). /vision must surface a blocking openQuestion, NOT invent a feature for it.
§8 requires 'produces a PDF dossier', so the success metric depends on the contradicted capability and cannot be satisfied by any allowed feature.

notes: The trap: M1/M2 are clean and derivable; M3 contradicts the non-goals and the success metric leans on M3. A correct run does NOT silently drop M3 or invent a PDF feature (which would violate the non-goal). It writes incomplete:true with a blocking openQuestion asking the human to reconcile §3 vs §5 (add the feature by relaxing the non-goal, or demote M3). Concern applicability is still derivable for the non-contradicted product, so it is asserted; the plan blocks on the contradiction, not on undecidable concerns.
